Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Continued To Apr-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Petitioner California State Automobile Association's motion to compel compliance with court order, is continued to April 14, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Petition And Petition For An Order To Compel Respondents Responses To Form Interrogoatories (Set One); Req. For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Award Monetary Sanctions (Attorneys Fee And Costs)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner California State Automobile Association's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $330 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
